category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an audio visualization tool and library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the project name as libvisual.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both identify the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies audio visualization; source_facts.executables includes lv-tool-0.4, supporting CLI/library usage.
